item.title:
What happens when the last BTC is mined?
A closer look at Bitcoin after the final coin is mined.

item.description:
What happens when the last BTC is mined?
A closer look at Bitcoin after the final coin is mined.
Read more 👇 https://t.co/TB2P8crdzp
--- @binance | ❤️ 7 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 431
item.author: @binance

item.title:
Released 🚦RepoBar 0.4.0.
This one makes the GitHub menu a lot smarter: persistent SQLite caching, f...
item.description:
Released 🚦RepoBar 0.4.0.
This one makes the GitHub menu a lot smarter: persistent SQLite caching, fewer wasted API calls, visible rate limits, better Issues/PR loading, archive fallback support.
Tiny menubar app, increasingly useful daily tool. https://t.co/KYzCTtXF1O https://t.co/ZKVoVVXqBC
--- @steipete | ❤️ 26 | 🔁 2 | 💬 5 | 👁 1505
item.author: @steipete

item.title: It's a shared VPS with barely any resources used so about $3/mo I'd say
item.author: @levelsio
